allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Write-Output "=== wsl present? ==="; \(Get-Command wsl\).Source; Write-Output "=== distros ==="; wsl -l -v; Write-Output "=== toolchain inside default distro ==="; wsl bash -lc "uname -a; for t in make qemu-system-riscv64 riscv64-linux-gnu-gcc riscv64-unknown-elf-gcc; do printf '%s -> ' \\$t; command -v \\$t || echo '\(missing\)'; done")

PowerShell(wsl bash -lc 'echo "=== tools ==="; command -v make || echo "make MISSING"; command -v qemu-system-riscv64 || echo "qemu MISSING"; command -v riscv64-linux-gnu-gcc || echo "riscv-gcc MISSING"; command -v timeout || echo "timeout MISSING"; echo "=== repo reachable? ==="; ls -d "/mnt/d/Edge Download/CSCC/proj54-ouc-os-lab/.git" && echo REPO_OK')
